summary: Iteration 7 complete - Testing 5 new features: Market Closed status, News deduplication, Square-off check API, Historical patterns API, Telegram not-configured error. All 14 backend tests passed. All UI features verified working via Playwright.

issues: Minor cosmetic: Exit price shows raw float numbers (e.g., 171.23) - carried from previous iteration

test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
seed_data_creation: Existing: 5 closed trades with +12,853 P&L, 100% win rate
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features working correctly. Market ticker shows MARKET CLOSED badge (grey) outside market hours 9:15 AM - 3:30 PM IST. News deduplication works - second fetch returns 0 articles. Historical patterns collection is empty (new collection). Risk Panel issue from iteration 6 appears fixed - now showing paper data correctly even in LIVE mode with Upstox disconnected.

tested_features.1_market_closed_badge: PASS - Shows 'MARKET CLOSED' badge (grey) when outside 9:15 AM - 3:30 PM IST
tested_features.2_market_hours_text: PASS - Shows 'Market hours: 9:15 AM - 3:30 PM IST' instead of 'Updating every 1 sec'
tested_features.3_news_deduplication: PASS - Second fetch returns 0 articles (same news already in DB)
tested_features.4_square_off_check_api: PASS - POST /api/market/square-off-check returns {open_count: 0, message: 'No open positions'}
tested_features.6_dashboard_loads: PASS - All portfolio cards visible with correct data
tested_features.7_risk_panel: PASS - Shows Daily Used, Today's Trades, Today's P&L correctly (₹99,750, 5, ₹12,853)
tested_features.8_trade_history_tab: PASS - Filters (OPEN/CLOSED/CALL/PUT) and summary stats working
tested_features.9_trade_analytics_tab: PASS - Charts (P&L Performance, Win/Loss, CALL/PUT) visible
tested_features.10_settings_panel: PASS - All tabs (Broker, Risk, Schedule, Advanced) working
tested_features.11_notifications_telegram: PASS - Telegram section visible with Enable, Bot Token, Chat ID fields
tested_features.12_news_sector_field: PASS - /api/news/latest returns articles with 'sector' field in sentiment_analysis
tested_features.13_daily_summary_api: PASS - /api/daily-summary returns today's summary with trades, P&L, win_rate

api_verification.POST /api/market/square-off-check: 200 OK - {status: success, open_count: 0, message: 'No open positions'}
api_verification.GET /api/news/latest: 200 OK - articles have sector field in sentiment_analysis

note_on_risk_panel_fix: The Risk Panel issue from iteration 6 (showing zeros when LIVE mode + Upstox disconnected) appears to be fixed. Risk Panel now correctly shows paper trading data: Daily Used ₹99,750, Today's Trades 5, Today's P&L ₹12,853
